hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*git[[:space:]]+commit([[:space:]]|$)'; then REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -q '^android/'; then JBR="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home"; [ -d "$JBR" ] && export JAVA_HOME="$JBR"; "$REPO_ROOT/android/gradlew" -p "$REPO_ROOT/android" lintDebug 1>&2 || exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0
